methodology: Derived from customer KPI pyramids, 1-year product strategy horizons, and delivery activity using an OKR-inspired structure.

goals.title: 2024-Q1 Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive outcome goal
goals.objective: Improve Time to Launch New Banking Products for Chief Digital Banking / Transformation Executive by advancing controlled modernization foundation through phased migration, integration standardization, and first modern product launches.
